ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the player */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the player */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the player competes in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "playing_hand" TEXT /* Playing hand of the player (left or right) */,
  "win_loss_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose rating is being tracked */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was recorded */,
  "previous_rating" INTEGER /* Previous rating of the player */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., world ranking, regional ranking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the player is transferring from */,
  "to_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the player is transferring to */,
  "from_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the player is transferring from */,
  "to_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer (e.g., nationality change, residency change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the tournament is for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the tournament is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tournament (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match is part of */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the match */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the match */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., singles, doubles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view player, update rating) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was won */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the bracket is for */,
  "bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the bracket */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of bracket (e.g., main draw, qualifying) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_brackets_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic is for */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., aces, double faults) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
